textByHash.b36e9b5aa5f2810a7e7ca0a749ff46a6c6c740c0: Enough talk, Hazeel. We have business to attend to. The Elder Horn will be claimed in Zamorak's name.
textByHash.0a941101f69fed987b02adfcb16cff285a7e9bfa: Of course not! Do you really think we'd have left it here for so long if that were the case? We are not fools.
textByHash.4dc6cb3cde3d90f276859a39e159695a075bca37: Speaking of fools, I know he's here as well! Reveal yourself!
textByHash.fd8c6ac8496be0533894e360dc662def28bb7273: It didn't have to be that way, Hazeel. We had proxies available. Had you supported my plan, we'd have the Horn by now.
textByHash.a1e0b2e673d37db463168119c14c3e217b751ada: Would you like me to turn you into a boneguard again, you camel-loving coward?
textByHash.ac8a5a2213a4544db829e1d29781679eacadaa4c: You Zarosians have no hope of withstanding the power of two Zamorakian Mahjarrat. The Horn is ours.
textByHash.29bddf45d99640076a9d5fc41be5a7bc3bbf4556: You think you can just take it?
textByHash.c617b7c75a44cc58c52ce424672e683ba94cfaee: He clearly wanted it for himself.
textByHash.596b083a8771e76b306ae48990ba651ce64705bc: He's finally lost it. We can take him. He's alone.
textByHash.88d62bc4fa6c8dac6b68af843cd7f89c357b730a: Then I'll just have to kill you first!
textByHash.fa003d04272f9f0ebb90615cdd38d9bcc652c5aa: I'll see you at the ritual, Akthanakos. Perhaps this one will be your last.
textByHash.3031561fb87aa0520792370837c8331744fa35fc: At last, it's complete. A temple fit for my lord.
textByHash.57df7f873a5dc70a49e9a6e00f5c12cbec2c348f: You will never have this temple - it belongs to my lord!
textByHash.3c7614332e216e86ef1b2091d842c38411697c5a: I wish I'd never supported him.
textByHash.b788791bfa6b80c489525c5f26c2de823553d6a7: Surely this would make a good weapon...
textByHash.0b596cb277e07c69d54af0b0f557028b499364d8: No, no! Curse it, that doesn't work!
textByHash.3d634c3b504b88bba325700234d9dd57f2c32f2f: But it's still a nice temple, isn't it?
textByHash.502af9229c44d1da5659ec90073f2443bff7104b: Ha ha ha. You believed me, didn't you?
textByHash.3dd903e3d9852f2fe1c39f634dbf9f55f4fa1f76: I would never desert my lord!
textByHash.963f341d8234cf5abf220b331fd2b25538f67de9: Don't interrupt me, human! I have to concentrate.
textByHash.f30443ec9b7368a5512fd96e4783ca64e98f2730: I'm keeping a weapon under control. If my attention wavers...
textByHash.24abaad2e58da5673b0f7330fc7886a8b9ef7838: ...then it tries to escape me. I must keep it safe for my lord Zamorak.
textByHash.01cfd7d9542531b772226b4c14eb486b81cecfa0: So, you're determined to meddle in other people's business?
textByHash.8954e7a37f5e6f8893f3240d6d4201d621f88260: That weapon has suddenly become a lot harder to control.
textByHash.a5f6a77c37f07d73c6bc31b3ed531fbfca307d7e: And I know it's your doing. He's tried to get you to help, hasn't he?
textByHash.f65fcc3e120953157502c19b70b55b71feb114d1: Of course, I don't suppose he's told you who he's trying to support, has he?
textByHash.2e669eafb8131abdd03e577f5d398875a4f3a4ad: How dare you throw around his name so casually?
textByHash.054d0e61eea053ba391d557088c4bf36a4115d64: No, Akthanakos never supported Zamorak. Not even after these thousands of years...
textByHash.4c04a0f058b9c27bd101a33471004a3e49c75953: He has pledged his allegiance to someone much more foul.
textByHash.cfa90724caaa4a7e91ab23c5ad2a89c355780344: ...There are some names it is wiser not to mention, human.
textByHash.a8cc2d533d43eb669b0dc7c400e76dcb0da3ea01: Such as the name of my lord Zamorak, that you seem so fond of throwing around.
textByHash.44c6f6f7582cf72b087eaf18235d7013e84facb7: Out of my sight, you unworthy scum, before I rend your flesh from your bones.
textByHash.427710e9238a45e6b2e52cfb52ce99a7b401538e: After so many years, why didn't you just give up?
textByHash.04d8f284e7faa79f1601a21dab6202693b407f15: Now my lord will punish you for destroying his weapon.
textByHash.8ff1e87355816c984723f0caec86009af1e50314: I'll be waiting for you in the north, Akthanakos.
